examples: "I do not want her to go to school," said the old man, unrelentingly.
With his right hand he unrelentingly kept whacking me with that umbrella.
Most countries celebrate the best in their pasts. Germany unrelentingly promotes its worst.
He slew the image of the unrelentingly macho sport hero and emerged heroically as the world's first all-purpose celebrity athlete.
But why the great disconnect in 2011 between the almost unrelentingly scary headlines on the one side and market returns on the other?
